para_trans: Request for transfer of officers in-
Department of School Education and Sports
Government Order No: 3625 / E-Office 1226152 / PRASH-2 of Nisu
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees
Section 4 (4) (ii) of the Prevention of Delay in Dismantling Act, 2005 and
According to the provision in section 4 (5), the officer mentioned in the table below shall have a column in front of his name.
The position indicated in No. 3 is being replaced by a request.
3. The said orders are being issued with the approval of the competent authority.
The Commissioner (Education), State of Maharashtra, Pune, prescribed the officers transferred in accordance with this order.
Ensure that you join the given position within the given time period.
The report should be submitted to the government.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
table_trans: A. Name of the officer, designation and present
Mr. Sanjay Sasane, Education Officer (Primary), Zilla Parishad, Washim.
